name: chatgit-extension
description: Browser extension build scaffold for ChatGit.

scripts.version: npm run sync-version && git add package.json src/manifests/manifest.chrome.json src/manifests/manifest.firefox.json
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore(release): v%s" && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore(release): v%s" && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore(release): v%s" && git push origin main --follow-tags
